metadata.description: Primary references for agentic coding documentation, PRD/spec writing, context engineering, and AI PRD risk/evaluation essentials.

context_engineering.name: Anthropic: Effective Context Engineering for AI Agents
context_engineering.relevance: Official guide on context engineering patterns including compaction, just-in-time context, and memory strategies.

context_engineering.name: GitHub Blog: Context Engineering
context_engineering.relevance: Explains context engineering evolution from prompt engineering; covers retrieval, context windows, and practical patterns.

context_engineering.name: Context Engineering Intro Repository
context_engineering.relevance: Reference implementation for context engineering patterns with Claude Code; includes examples folder pattern.

context_engineering.name: AI PRD Template (OpenAI Product Lead)
context_engineering.relevance: AI PRD framework by Miqdad Jaffer (Product Lead at OpenAI); covers AI-specific PRD sections and evaluation.

agentic_coding_platform_docs.name: Claude Code Documentation (Anthropic)
agentic_coding_platform_docs.relevance: Primary reference for Claude Code workflows and project memory patterns (CLAUDE.md).

agentic_coding_platform_docs.name: GitHub Copilot Documentation
agentic_coding_platform_docs.relevance: Official reference for Copilot features, policies, and integrations.

agentic_coding_platform_docs.name: Cursor Documentation
agentic_coding_platform_docs.relevance: Operational reference for Cursor workflows (context, edits, project setup).

prompting_and_prd_basics.name: OpenAI Prompt Engineering Guide
prompting_and_prd_basics.relevance: Prompting best practices for instruction design and reliability patterns.

prompting_and_prd_basics.name: Anthropic Prompt Library
prompting_and_prd_basics.relevance: Official prompt patterns and safety-oriented prompting examples.

ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.name: NIST AI RMF 1.0
ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.relevance: Risk management framing for AI systems (govern, map, measure, manage) useful for AI PRDs.

ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.name: ISO/IEC 42001 Overview
ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.relevance: AI management system standard overview; useful for governance expectations in AI product PRDs.

ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.name: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.relevance: Primary regulatory text; impacts risk classification, transparency, and compliance planning for AI PRDs.

ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.name: OpenAI Evals
ai_prd_risk_and_evaluation.relevance: Evaluation harness patterns for LLM-based systems; useful reference for offline eval planning.

optional_ai_automation.name: OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications
optional_ai_automation.relevance: Optional: threat taxonomy (prompt injection, data leakage, model supply chain) to drive AI PRD failure modes.

optional_ai_automation.name: FTC: Trade Regulation Rule on Consumer Reviews and Testimonials (16 CFR Part 465)
optional_ai_automation.relevance: Optional: regulatory reference for review/testimonial handling when AI systems generate or surface reviews.
